examples: I think I've finally unzipped this calculus problem.
Find setup.exe in the unzipped folder, and double-click it.
When the black sleeve is unzipped, however, a chartreuse-colored sneaker with a large Jumpman logo on the tongue is revealed.
Dan MacArthur did his usual wonderful job rounding up my post and a bunch of other worthwhile ones over at Genomes Unzipped.
